title: Here's Why Flex (FLEX) is a Strong Value Stock

title: FLEX Q3 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: FLEX third-quarter fiscal 2023 performance was boosted by strong demand across all business segments amid macroeconomic disruptions.

title: Flex (FLEX) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Flex (FLEX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.33% and 3.69%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Contract Manufacturer Flex Bends On Lowered Earnings Outlook
text: Electronics contract manufacturer Flex topped estimates for its fiscal third quarter. But its guidance disappointed.

title: FLEX Set to Report Q3 Earnings: Here's What You Should Know
text: FLEX's fiscal third-quarter performance is likely to have benefited from increased demand for its industrial and automotive segments.

title: Flex Announces Date for Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Call
text: SAN JOSE, Calif. , Jan. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) will announce its third quarter fiscal 2023 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, January 25, 2023.

title: Flex Ltd.: Behind The Scenes Renewables Manufacturer
text: Flex has had a great 6 months as its OEM manufacture partnerships have performed well in a difficult market. With major investments in equipment for renewables, electric cars, and automation, Flex is well-positioned to benefit from a world in transition in energy and transport.

title: Flex: Shares Burst Through Resistance, Valuation And Free Cash Flow Still Attractive
text: Most tech stocks have cratered in the last year, but not Flex Ltd. With strong free cash flow and management's shareholder focus, I see more upside ahead.
